name: WF-03 Publish YouTube Shorts Auto Schedule

parameters.jsCode:
const isPending = Boolean($json.youtube_visibility_pending);
const result = {
  job_id: $json.job_id || null,
  stage: 'WF-03_PUBLISH_YOUTUBE_SHORTS',
  status: isPending ? 'YOUTUBE_PROCESSING_PENDING' : 'YOUTUBE_UPLOADED',
  published_at: $json.published_at || new Date().toISOString(),
  status_checked_at: $json.youtube_status_checked_at || new Date().toISOString(),
  status_context: $json.youtube_status_context || null,
  publish_mode: $json.youtube_publish_mode || (isPending ? 'reconcile_existing_video' : 'new_upload'),
  existing_result_status_before_run: $json.youtube_existing_result_status || null,
  existing_result_published_at: $json.youtube_existing_result_published_at || null,
  manifest_path: String($json.manifest_path || '').replace(/^\/files\//, 'shared/'),
  caption_result_path: String($json.caption_result_path || '').replace(/^\/files\//, 'shared/'),
  youtube_publish_result_path: String($json.youtube_publish_result_path || '').replace(/^\/files\//, 'shared/'),
  clip_path: String($json.clip_path || '').replace(/^\/files\//, 'shared/'),
  clip_index: $json.clip_index || null,
  clip_id: $json.clip_id || null,
  file_name: $json.file_name || null,
  source_video_url: $json.source_video_url || null,
  source_video_id: $json.source_video_id || null,
  platform: 'youtube_shorts',
  approval_mode: $json.approval_mode || 'required',
  approval_bypassed: Boolean($json.approval_bypassed),
  privacy_status: $json.youtube_privacy_status_effective || 'private',
  target_visibility: $json.youtube_target_visibility || $json.youtube_privacy_status || 'private',
  processing_status: $json.youtube_processing_status || null,
  processing_status_raw: $json.youtube_processing_status_raw || $json.youtube_processing_status || null,
  processing_status_source: $json.youtube_processing_status_source || null,
  video_id: $json.youtube_video_id || null,
  youtube_watch_url: $json.youtube_watch_url || null,
  youtube_shorts_url: $json.youtube_shorts_url || ($json.youtube_video_id ? 'https://www.youtube.com/shorts/' + $json.youtube_video_id : null),
  youtube_studio_url: $json.youtube_studio_url || null,
  title: $json.youtube_uploaded_title || $json.title || null,
  description: $json.youtube_uploaded_description || $json.description || null,
  hashtags: $json.youtube_uploaded_hashtags || $json.hashtags || [],
  next_stage: null,
};
const content = JSON.stringify(result, null, 2) + '\n';
return {
  json: {
    ...$json,
    youtube_publish_result_payload: result,
  },
  binary: {
    data: {
      data: Buffer.from(content, 'utf8').toString('base64'),
      mimeType: 'application/json',
      fileName: String($json.youtube_publish_result_path || 'youtube_publish_result.json').split('/').pop(),
    }
  }
};
